isolationContext: Single daemon instance on /tmp/swell-daemon.sock, single CLI process

results.evidence: Command 'swell task "test task creation"' returned 'Task created: 160e8200-9ddd-4a03-945a-94a522798905'
Command 'swell list' returned JSON array with task details including id, description, state, etc.
Command 'swell watch <task-id>' returned 'Task <id> is now: CREATED'
Command 'swell cancel <task-id>' transitioned task to FAILED. Command 'swell approve <task-id>' returned error 'Invalid state transition: Cannot start task without plan' (expected behavior)
Full CLI workflow verified: task creation, listing, watching, and cancel all work via CLI. End-to-end task execution via CLI is now functional.
